official_name: Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program
notes: FedRAMP publishes analysis methodologies that prescribe processes (rather than control catalogs). The threat-based risk-profiling methodology is the canonical example.

data.description: A phase-based scoring methodology FedRAMP uses to assess the relative criticality of security controls against MITRE ATT&CK-derived threat scenarios. Produces prioritized control rankings rather than a control catalog of its own.
